title: selaginella nipponica
intro: Selaginella nipponica is a species of spore-producing plant, belonging to the Selaginella genus, commonly known as a resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella nipponica include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and improving circulation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and usage may vary depending on the region.
